title: Jonatanas Kazlauskas' "Sorry" by Justin Bieber Performance
about: Jonatanas Kazlauskas' "Sorry" by Justin Bieber Performance , also known as Lithuanian Justin Bieber , is a viral video of Lithuanian singer Jonatanas Kazlauskas performing the song " Sorry " by Justin Bieber on X Factor Lithuania in 2015, during which he forgets the lyrics and awkwardly dances while apologizing to the judges. The video was uploaded to YouTube in 2016 and resurfaced on Instagram Reels and TikTok in February 2026, inspiring memes and edits that both make fun of Kazlauskas' performance and show other performances of his to showcase his "redemption."
origin:
On January 4th, 2016, the X Factor Lithuania YouTube [1] channel uploaded a video from their 2015 season of contestant Jonatanas Kazlauskas performing "Sorry" by Justin Bieber, garnering over 1.1 million views in 10 years. Throughout the performance, Kazlauskas forgets lyrics, awkwardly dances and sings off-key.

Kazlauskas was not eliminated for the performance, as fan votes kept him in the competition. He was later eliminated in the seventh week of the competition.

In late January 2026, the video resurfaced on TikTok. The earliest known, viral reupload was posted on January 30th, 2026, by TikToker [2] @riskyhack2 with the caption, "Justin Bieber from 'Temu,' " garnering over 1.8 million views in a week.
